runtimeBoundaryAuthorityScope: Runtime-neutral boundary contract only; canonical plugin workflow source remains the private marketplace payload.

consumerRuntimes.consumesVia: native-plugin-loader plus Claude-native runtime overlay under ~/.claude/**
private GitHub marketplace palantir-mini@palantir-mini-marketplace; Codex protocol ownership stays under ~/.codex/**

forbiddenForks: Do NOT create workflow semantic forks in ~/.codex/plugins/palantir-mini/ or other runtime dirs.
Runtime-native protocol adapters, settings, memory stores, and reload docs belong in the owning runtime home.
Per-runtime adapters are protocol authorities for their native runtime, not palantir-mini workflow authorities.
